title: hieracium benzianum subsp. ausserdorferi
intro: Hieracium benzianum subsp. ausserdorferi is a rare, subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant native to specific regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium benzianum subsp. ausserdorferi include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
